summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard. Already-closed PRs are kept closed, security-sensitive #68701 and linked #88332 are routed to central security handling, and open PRs are kept for maintainer or proof follow-up rather than closed or merged.
